# arif-fazil.com

## Identity
Arif Fazil is a Senior Exploration Geoscientist and the architect of arifOS.

## Core Projects
- arifOS: A constitutional AI runtime (AGPL-3.0).
- Constellation: A federated intelligence system (Ψ, Δ, Φ, Ω).

## Canonical Pages
- /canon: The arifOS Constitution and 13 Floors.
- /discoveries: Geoscience track record (Petronas).
- /docs: Technical documentation.
- /essays: Personal reflections on governance and earth intelligence.

## Access
Public: https://arif-fazil.com
Private: https://arif-fazil.com/999 (ROOTKEY required)
